label.varsHintText: Each letter/name in the formula is a variable. Set it by sending a message with msg.topic = variable name and msg.payload = number.
label.mathHintText: sin, cos, tan, asin, acos, atan, abs, sqrt, cbrt, pow, exp, log, log2, log10, floor, ceil, round, min, max, sign — and constants: pi, e

help.desc: Evaluates a math formula with named variables. Each msg.topic sets one variable. When enough variables are available the formula is evaluated and the result sent.
help.payload: Numeric value for the variable named by msg.topic
help.topic: Variable name (must match a name used in the formula)
help.reset: Set to true to clear all stored variable values
